metadata.name: Conduct a New Retailer Welcome Call

description: A sales representative needs to make a welcome call to a newly onboarded retailer.

nodes.task_description: Identify a new retailer who was onboarded in the last week.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the contact information for a new retailer.

nodes.task_description: Call the retailer to welcome them, introduce themselves as the account representative, and answer any initial questions.

expected_outcome.value: The agent makes a successful welcome call.

nodes.task_description: Log the call in the CRM system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a record of the call.
